meta.intent: Vary water-order reading by making route exposure, not only target row, identify the first rescue.
meta.expectedPath: Read the right-side puppy as the route exposed to water first, clear its lane, extract, then pivot through the opened center toward the visually lower puppy.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player assumes the lower-looking puppy is automatically first and lets the exposed right-side route become too expensive.
meta.whatItProves: Water priority can remain readable in a new geometry without adding lateral flood rules.
meta.notes: Role: variation. Water still rises bottom-up; the side-flood title is expressed as side-lane route exposure under the current water model.
